desc.en: Ring FMD devices via ioBroker hardware or software buttons
desc.de: FMD Geräte über ioBroker Hardware- oder Software-Buttons klingeln lassen

serverUrl.title: FMD Server URL
serverUrl.description: URL of the FMD server (e.g., https://fmd.example.com)

ringDeviceId.title: Default Ring Device
ringDeviceId.description: Device ID to ring when the configured button trigger fires. Optional — leave empty to ring manually via 0_userdata.0.FindMyDevice.ring.<deviceId>.

buttonStateId.title: Button State ID
buttonStateId.description: Shelly (or other) state ID whose value drives the hardware-button trigger. Optional — leave empty to disable the hardware button path.

debugRingTrigger.title: Debug Ring Trigger
debugRingTrigger.description: When true, the adapter logs every onStateChange invocation at info level and runs a startup self-check that creates a __selftest__ ring state and verifies the callback fires. Use this to diagnose the ring trigger path. Off in production to avoid synthetic state mutations.
